'''labata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyriolexy|kyriolexy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyriolexy|kyriolexy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| labata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbætæth|læbætæth]] || [[word:læbætæj|læbætæj]] || [[word:læbætæsh|læbætæsh]] || [[word:læbætæ|læbætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lababatath|lababatath]] || [[word:lababataj|lababataj]] || [[word:lababatash|lababatash]] || [[word:lababata|lababata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:labatath|labatath]] || [[word:labataj|labataj]] || [[word:labatash|labatash]] || [[word:labata|labata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:labaftath|labaftath]] || [[word:labaftaj|labaftaj]] || [[word:labaftash|labaftash]] || [[word:labaftaf|labaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labatatha|labatatha]] || [[word:labataja|labataja]] || [[word:labatasha|labatasha]] || [[word:labataka|labataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labatath|labatath]] || [[word:labataj|labataj]] || [[word:labatash|labatash]] || [[word:labata|labata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labatathal|labatathal]] || [[word:labatajal|labatajal]] || [[word:labatashal|labatashal]] || [[word:labatakal|labatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labatathatha|labatathatha]] || [[word:labatajaja|labatajaja]] || [[word:labatashasha|labatashasha]] || [[word:labataka|labataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labatathan|labatathan]] || [[word:labatajan|labatajan]] || [[word:labatashan|labatashan]] || [[word:labatakan|labatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labatathaoro|labatathaoro]] || [[word:labatajaoro|labatajaoro]] || [[word:labatashaoro|labatashaoro]] || [[word:labatakaoro|labatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
